name: Spicy Beef Carbonade
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds sirloin tips or stew beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, flameproof casserole dish, add the bacon, olive oil, onions, and garlic.
2. Sauté until tender.
3. Add beef, sugar, vinegar, wine, broth, chili powder, herbs (rosemary, thyme, oregano), bay leaves, tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper.
4. Place the lid on the dish to keep in juices.
5. Cook on high for 10 minutes, then reduce to a simmer for 1 hour.
6. Remove the lid and discard the bay leaves.
7. Mix in corn starch. Add a little more wine and cook until thick, stirring often.
8. Serve over rice or pasta. Optionally, add a few habaneros, thais, or serranos for extra heat.
